evidence.scientific_clarity: All 4 panels present and match brief; Panel D heatmap and Panel B ablation carry quantitative signal; caption cites score 64.7.
evidence.typography: Script lacks pdf.fonttype=42; pdffonts confirms Type 3 (not Type 42) embedding; DejaVu Sans default used throughout — text not selectable.
evidence.palette: Viridis for heatmap is colorblind-safe; blue/gray categorical palette in Panels B–C; no red/green directional misuse.
evidence.layout_density: Bottom panel spans full width per brief; 2:1:1 top ratio implemented; no overlapping labels observed; whitespace reasonable.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content; all panels labeled A–D in bold; specific numerical claim (64.7) present; legend placed inside Panel C.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdffonts shows Type 3 fonts (DejaVuSans), not Type 42; script has no pdf.fonttype=42 setting; text is not selectable in PDF.
evidence.file_format: All required files present: figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, gen_figure.py; bonus figure.svg also generated; all non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Each panel described with specific finding; numerical claim (64.7 for full model); ablation component names listed; sweep parameters identified.

overall_strengths: Complete 4-panel layout exactly matching brief specification with correct gridspec ratios and full-width bottom panel.
Colorblind-safe viridis heatmap with per-cell numerical annotations and all required output files present including bonus SVG.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 setting causes Type 3 font embedding — text is not selectable or editable in the PDF.
Default DejaVu Sans font used throughout; no custom font choice made to differentiate from matplotlib defaults.
